Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Slumbering Wraith]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Slumbering Wraith is an attack from the Devourer itself and is known as Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Slumbering Wraith is a Striker technique that acts like a spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — The Slumbering Wraith hungers for all things, even death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The Slumbering Wraith has an eye that can be felt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon faces the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — The Slumbering Wraith has an echo that can bless Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Slumbering Wraith may have died or released what it was holding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The Slumbering Wraith is a being whose throne Lindon occupies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon emerged with the power of the Slumbering Wraith under control.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — The Slumbering Wraith's will is noticeable in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Slumbering Wraith's limb can sense the struggle of its brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Slumbering Wraith possesses hunger.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The Slumbering Wraith is a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — The Slumbering Wraith is a source of a limb for Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Wandering Titan is a copy of the Wandering Titan from before the Dreadgods inherited the Slumbering Wraith’s strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — The largest gate into the labyrinth is etched with a stylized depiction of the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Slumbering Wraith has died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Lindon is becoming the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Slumbering Wraith has a core binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Lindon has part of his body made from the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Lindon uses the right hand of the Slumbering Wraith to consume earth madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Slumbering Wraith’s flesh grew out of Lindon.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
